variants: Maya Kirmani possesses extensive expertise in Supply Chain Management and is also a passionate member of the Heathershine Gem Finders, where she delves into the world of gemology. She has earned the professional license known as the Runestone Engraver Warrant, which validates her skills in her field. During her academic career, Maya benefited from the mentorship of Jeremi Oyekanmi, whose guidance has been instrumental in her development. Moreover, she has been supported by the Compassreed Scholars Trust, providing essential funding for her projects. Through her unique blend of interests, Maya Kirmani has become an influential figure in both her professional domain and the gems community.
